name: WP-W3-pii-step-state: remove minor-PII from memoized Inngest step returns
description: W3 (PII-handling, minor-PII egress) — memoize an ID/handle, not the minor's name/topics/birth-year (a memoized step return is persisted by Inngest): change each offending step's return to carry a reference; rehydrate downstream. Same fix across 6 sibling Inngest functions; shares the four-unit scrubber discipline.
acceptanceCriteria: No minor-PII in any memoized step return; break-test per function; shared scrubber exported from a canonical home (bundle-level AC across the four W3 PII units). Findings: F-075, F-085, F-086, F-087, F-088, F-089 (6). P-batching hint: may slice the 6 into 2 batches if a single PR is too large — the pattern is identical, the split mechanical. Source of truth: _wip/identity-foundation/2026-06-09-phase-o-master-plan.md §1 WP-W3-pii-step-state (commit 23d0c01ad)
riskImpact: M / risky — memoized step-state persistence across 6 functions.
bodyText:
Bundle brief (WP-W3-pii-step-state)
Transcribed from the ratified Phase-O master plan §1 → "WP-W3-pii-step-state" @ 23d0c01ad — frozen source of truth. Children are absorbed provenance (ZDX-ADR-0001): WI-606/607.
Bundle rationale
Same fix at the step-return site across sibling Inngest functions — memoize an ID/handle, not the minor's name/topics/birth-year (a memoized step return is persisted by Inngest).
Strategy
Change each offending step's return to carry a reference; rehydrate downstream. Shared scrubber discipline (see WI-577 brief).
Scope
In: F-075, F-085, F-086, F-087, F-088, F-089 (6 functions). Out: event payloads (WI-577).
Findings table
Acceptance Criteria (bundle)
No minor-PII in any memoized step return.
Break-test per function.
Risk & blast radius
M / risky — memoized step-state persistence across 6 functions. Depends on WP-W1-spine (WI-571) + WP-W2-scope-rls (WI-574). P-batching hint: the 6 may split into 2 PRs if one is too large — the pattern is identical, split is mechanical.
